assets.post_chain: corner-flood alpha key (tol 90) -> bbox crop +6% margin square -> 64x64 nearest -> mediancut quantize 32 (fg only)

gates.tier3: frontier judge: generation excellent, silhouette legible at 64px (smoke-test judgment, rubric formalizes with asset-warden scripts)

assets.repair_note: round 1: fill 0.095 + 388 colors -> post-chain repair (crop-to-content + quantize), no re-roll needed

assets.status: approved — human Tier-3 pass 2026-07-12: "works well enough for the job, good calming town theme". Loop post-process still pending (A.4 battery) before engine integration.

conditioning_inputs.mannequin_canvases: embedded base64 in workflow (offline corrected-units render of VNCCS_Utils MakeHuman CharacterData; gait keyframes in workflow _meta)

right.source: ShaftWarden/Neutral/sprite_pose_0006.png (mirrored; true right profile 0003 rejected: warm rim light bakes jacket brown + face in shadow, would mismatch the left row)

assets.post_chain: green chroma key -> ground-shadow scrub v2.1 (ink-chain protection: suspect px below 78% height survive only if chained to above-band ink, <=6-row gaps, +-1 px/row drift; hard cut below 92% — v1 brightness-based sole protection ate the near-black boot bottoms, and QIE paints shadow blobs above the old 82.5% band start) -> fixed 4-col frame cut -> shared per-direction registration (median feet baseline, mean x-centroid, one global scale char->24px) -> 35%-coverage area downsample to 24x32 -> hard alpha + largest component -> shared baseline snap to row 29 -> mediancut <=64 colors/direction

gates.tier3: agent judge (identity v2): all 16 frames correct facing, clothed ShaftWarden identity consistent across rows (dark quilted jacket, charcoal cargo pants, black boots, amber face); gait reads at game res in all 4 rows, left/right scissor strides strongest; weakest: left row contact frames drawn ~1px airborne (feet_dev 1.0, tiny bounce on loop) and down-row stride is subtle at 1x; outfit is near-black — check contrast on the darkest mine tilesets. Conductor + human are final judges

assets.repair_note: identity v2 re-cut: all 4 canvases green at the v1 pinned seeds on the first generation (refs swapped only — seeds/mannequins/prompts untouched); 0 generation repairs, 0 reseeds. Post-chain repaired 2x (deterministic, not candidate burns): scrub v2 ink-chain protection (v1 brightness sole protection ate near-black boot bottoms in contact frames -> feet_dev/baseline fails), scrub v2.1 band 82.5%->78% + above-band-only seeds (QIE shadow blobs sat above the band and seeded their own tails -> horizontal streaks at feet). v1 (underwear base) history: workflow _meta run_record
